criteria.reason: English selected text with Russian original_text generated Russian Excel scene descriptions.
Russian-target selected text remains preferred when target_language is ru.
The change is limited to Template_3 display-column selection and does not rewrite transcript artifacts or scoring text.
Missing original/source text falls back to the selected text column.
Generated workbook preserves Russian UTF-8 text in raw scene_description cells and markup formulas keep referencing those cells.
Syntax, unit, integration, fallback, and diff hygiene checks passed.

commands_run: Unit text-column selection check via python stdin
Synthetic Template_3 workbook generation with English text and Russian original_text via python stdin
